title: Hapes refugee camp
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Conjecture|legends}}
The '''Hapes refugee camp''' held the refugees from [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] during the takeover by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. It consisted of countless rows of [[Durasilk/Legends|durasilk]] tents that housed a multitude of [[Species/Legends|species]]. The camp stood out as a likely target to the Yuuzhan Vong.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey]]''
